# idsec_identity_webapp_custom_template (Data Source)

The Identity service webapp custom template data source. It reads the webapp custom template information and metadata and is based on the ID of the webapp custom template or its name.

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `webapp_template_id` (String) Unique identifier of the custom webapp template to fetch
- `webapp_template_name` (String) Name of the custom webapp template to fetch

### Read-Only

- `app_type` (String) Type of the app
- `app_type_display_name` (String) Display name of the app type
- `category` (String) Category of the webapp template
- `description` (String) Description of the webapp template
- `display_name` (String) Display name of the webapp template
- `generic` (Boolean) Whether the template is generic
- `is_sca_enabled` (Boolean) Whether SCA is enabled
- `is_sws_enabled` (Boolean) Whether SWS is enabled
- `service_name` (String) Service name associated with the template
- `template_name` (String) Name of the template
- `user_name_strategy` (String) User name strategy
- `version` (String) Version of the webapp template
- `webapp_login_type` (String) Web app login type
- `webapp_type_display_name` (String) Display name of the web app type
